title: Limitation on amount to be borrowed
doc_html:
§222.  Limitation on amount to be borrowed

The amount borrowed for and on behalf of any municipality or parish shall in no case exceed seventy-five per cent of the estimated income to be realized from the special tax previously voted in the municipality or parish.
doc_text:
§222.  Limitation on amount to be borrowed
The amount borrowed for and on behalf of any municipality or parish shall in no case exceed seventy-five per cent of the estimated income to be realized from the special tax previously voted in the municipality or parish.
